                   --model_name MODEL_NAME
                   [--ground_truth_source GROUND_TRUTH_SOURCE]
                   [--region REGION] [--subregion SUBREGION]
                   [--lead_time_hours LEAD_TIME_HOURS [LEAD_TIME_HOURS ...]]
                   [--training_vars TRAINING_VARS [TRAINING_VARS ...]]
                   [--output_vars OUTPUT_VARS [OUTPUT_VARS ...]]
                   [--train_start TRAIN_START] [--train_end TRAIN_END]
                   [--test_start TEST_START] [--test_end TEST_END]
                   [--nn_architecture {mlp,unet}] [--bootstrap BOOTSTRAP]
                   [--growing_season_only]
                   [--alternate_loss_fn {quantile_loss,extreme_heat_loss}]

                   [--ground_truth_source GROUND_TRUTH_SOURCE]
                   [--region REGION] [--subregion SUBREGION]
                   [--lead_time_hours LEAD_TIME_HOURS [LEAD_TIME_HOURS ...]]
                   [--training_vars TRAINING_VARS [TRAINING_VARS ...]]
                   [--output_vars OUTPUT_VARS [OUTPUT_VARS ...]]
                   [--train_start TRAIN_START] [--train_end TRAIN_END]
                   [--test_start TEST_START] [--test_end TEST_END]
                   [--nn_architecture {mlp,unet}] [--bootstrap BOOTSTRAP]
                   [--growing_season_only]
                   [--alternate_loss_fn {quantile_loss,extreme_heat_loss}]
finetune.py: error: argument --bootstrap: expected one argument
